rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §255.005, which criminalizes misrepresentation of identity in political advertising. No conflict exists.
quote: A person commits an offense if, with intent to injure a candidate or influence the result of an election, the person misrepresents the person's identity
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
